_doc: 租户品牌与分类配置 · sample 版本。复制为 tenant_config.json 后按需改。tenant_config.json 已 gitignore。

brand.name: Example Workspace
brand.insight_placeholder: Focus area? e.g. team / product / finance / risk

reports._doc: 报告目录（相对 vault 根）。不配则默认 'reports'。老仓可设 'Projects/XXX/reports' 兼容既有路径。

prompts.user_bio: a senior AI product & tech leader

categories._doc: 访谈文件名前缀 → 分类。空数组=禁用该分类。seg0 = stem.split('·')[0]
